text.text:
I love this place. It's run by a really sweet couple. There's always veggie and vegan options and you can tell they love what they do because there's always something new to try.
Don't get too attached to one item, but do know that whatever they have is great.
You'd never get the quality and flavor from a big chain type place. It feels like you're going over for a visit and they whipped something up to enjoy while you sit around the table.
They have a new space so there's more on the menu. Today I focused on pastries then stopped at the AK Fresh Roast right next to them.
Today I got the matcha creme filled bun, flan topped roll and the ube roll. They were each so different and delicious.
Stop by early cuz they sell out and yes, It's worth the price!

text.text:
BAKING WITH ISH is a small bakery stand that offer Filipino-inspired pastries, high-quality ingredients, and generous portions. Customers like myself frequently praise the unique flavors, excellent presentation, and friendly customer service. It is located in SGV plaza on Mission.

They have popular items such as ube and ensaymada pastries, and seasonal pies. Moreover, most of their pastry items are pricey which I say suck it up. Perhaps you can indulge it once every couple months.

I was taken aback by their pastries prodigious appearance and presentation. Male staff was affable, nice and professional. Overall, I recommend you visit this cute little pastry shop. So there you have it folks.

text.text:
I’m here now enjoying a pumpkin flan bun compelled to share with the Google world how great this business is. Writing this review as I visit yet ANOTHER time and savor these extra calories. I still feel the same way so sharing what I said on another platform:

Time and time again, I come to support Ish and get blown away at each pastry or pie I've tried and have yet to try.

For example, today, I came in to try an ube pecan pie slice - and boom also landed with a black sesame pumpkin bun and an ube cheese pan de sal. My cravings got the best of me and how I ate the latter two pastries in under three minutes is beyond me. My senses were so strong that I am literally writing this with crumbs around my mouth. The breads were fresh, soft and delicious in every bite. Not too sweet in my opinion and you can really taste all the flavors that are described. The pillowy bite of that pan de sal is replaying in my head and I want ten more. Give him all your money and come support this wonderful exquisite baker. I've tried other things in the past two but needed to highlight this experience while it was clear in my mind.

Located in his own space right when you enter the Ramona St entrance at Blossom Market hall- the unmissable Baking with Ish sign will welcome you. You can never go wrong as there is plentiful parking spots and a variety of food, drink and dessert vendors all in one spot. It's quaint enough for a study session and big enough for a bigger group gathering. Something for everyone.

Just make sure you're aware of the open hours as he's not there everyday and while you're at it, give him a follow on Instagram @bakingwithish so you can drool over the pictures with me. I am not affiliated with him at all, just truly an avid fan of the craft and just so happy to continue supporting his small business as long as my wallet allows.

text.text: This place is delicious. Special. One of a kind.  They put their whole heart into this exceptional dishes and desserts. Like nothing in all of LA.

originalText.text: This place is delicious. Special. One of a kind.  They put their whole heart into this exceptional dishes and desserts. Like nothing in all of LA.

text.text: We are regulars here with Baking with Ish and partner. Although I can't have to much sweets and they know this so they go out of their way to make less sweet items. That's very kind and thoughtful of them. Sure you wait in line, just as you do at a long Starbucks drive thru, right. It's all worth it because these 2 work very hard to make their small business happen. Please be patient and kind. Get to know the bakers, they are fun and funny. Always making me laugh. My husband and I will always support this gem of a spot. The Ube pie is top notch! My favorite and the handmade crust I love dipping in coffee. If you have never owned a small business before and know what it takes to make a dream come true, then walk away. Baking with Ish is a treasure and dear to my heart. Great job guys!!! Sweat and blood. We love you!
